objections.objection_text: The debt and legal bills are so large ($900k+) that they feel insurmountable to even budget for.
objections.underlying_belief: Recovery is impossible if the hole is too deep; financial math dictates spiritual outcome.
objections.underlying_fear: Confession of judgment/bankruptcy and loss of previous status forever.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Dismantling the mountain in 5% pieces removes the overwhelm. God's grace resides in the piecework, not the insurmountable sum.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: When you look at it all, it's just so insurmountable that it just feels like impossible. But if it's just piecework... then I know and trust that in the end it'll be okay.
